tasks.subject: Task 1: Add i18n strings for agent setup cards
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add all i18n keys needed by the agent setup UI to all three locale files.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps/desktop/src/i18n/locales/en.json` (mainPanel section)
- Modify: `apps/desktop/src/i18n/locales/ja.json` (mainPanel section)
- Modify: `apps/desktop/src/i18n/locales/ko.json` (mainPanel section)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] English strings added under `mainPanel` key
- [ ] Japanese strings added under `mainPanel` key
- [ ] Korean strings added under `mainPanel` key
- [ ] `bun tsc --noEmit` passes

**Verify:** `cd apps/desktop && bun tsc --noEmit` ŌåÆ exits 0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/desktop/src/i18n/locales/en.json", "apps/desktop/src/i18n/locales/ja.json", "apps/desktop/src/i18n/locales/ko.json"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps/desktop && bun tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["English strings added", "Japanese strings added", "Korean strings added", "tsc passes"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Add agent CLI detection and setup cards to MainPanel
tasks.description:
**Goal:** When no repos exist, the empty state shows two agent cards with install instructions or installed status with version.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps/desktop/src/components/MainPanel.vue`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `which_binary` called for both claude and copilot on mount when !hasRepos
- [ ] Version extracted via semver regex from `--version` output
- [ ] Not-installed card shows name, install command, copy button, shell hint
- [ ] Installed card shows name, green checkmark, version
- [ ] Copy button copies install command with brief feedback
- [ ] Import repo hint still appears below agent cards
- [ ] `bun tsc --noEmit` passes

**Verify:** `cd apps/desktop && bun tsc --noEmit` ŌåÆ exits 0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/desktop/src/components/MainPanel.vue"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps/desktop && bun tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["which_binary called for both CLIs", "semver version extraction", "install card UI", "installed card UI", "copy button works", "import hint preserved", "tsc passes"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Enable shell at $HOME and re-check CLIs on close
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `Ōć¦ŌīśJ` opens ShellModal to `$HOME` when no repo is selected. Closing ShellModal triggers CLI re-check in the empty state.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps/desktop/src/App.vue`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `Ōć¦ŌīśJ` works with no repo selected ŌĆö shell opens at $HOME
- [ ] ShellModal v-if no longer requires store.selectedRepo when shellRepoRoot is true
- [ ] Closing ShellModal calls recheckClis() on MainPanel ref when no repos
- [ ] `bun tsc --noEmit` passes

**Verify:** `cd apps/desktop && bun tsc --noEmit` ŌåÆ exits 0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/desktop/src/App.vue"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps/desktop && bun tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["shell opens at $HOME with no repo", "ShellModal works without selectedRepo", "re-check on shell close", "tsc passes"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```
